title: defparam inside generate does not work correctly
body:
---


Author Name: **Alex Solomatnikov**
Original Redmine Issue: 543 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2012-08-07
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

This used to work 3 months ago:

```
generate
if (A_FAST_SIM_MODEL)
begin

         a_abstract a_inst (
...
         );
         defparam a_inst.PIN_WIDTH = 8;
...
end
else 
begin
         a_sv a_inst (
...
         );
         defparam a_inst.PIN_WIDTH = 8;
...
end

```

Now I get errors:

```
%Error: a.v:214: Duplicate pin connection: PIN_WIDTH
%Error: a.v:130: ... Location of original pin connection

```
